title: rhododendron xanthostephanum
intro: Rhododendron xanthostephanum, also known as the yellow-flowered rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron xanthostephanum include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron xanthostephanum include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
